
▸ New Endpoints: 2025-12-16.batman → 2026-01-29.edison

Base: 2025-12-16.batman
Latest: 2026-01-29.edison

Added: 6
  + GET /grid-fee-reductions :: Get all grid reductions
  + GET /grid-fee-reductions/{id} :: Get a grid reduction
  + GET /meter-orders :: Get all meter orders
  + GET /meter-orders/{id} :: Get a meter order
  + POST /grid-fee-reductions :: Create a grid fee reduction
  + POST /meter-orders :: Create a meter order

Removed: 0
